updates.tweet_text: Key to remember you dont need any opinion on where price is going to profit as a day trader - and if you do, it has to be background. Have zones planned where you want to engage, have a setup at those zones, let price pick one. When it does, react with a trade. No crystal ball.
updates.notes: Pure methodology commentary with no price levels named whatsoever — no actionable prices, no new levels introduced.

updates.tweet_text: @KyBp6 @turtle_trad3r Yes non-acceptance protocol is very simple. You can use it on any trade. For the 7527 long it never triggered at any point. Price has to hold above 7532 for a few minutes. Usually on a good entry the entry would be something like 7537 or 7538 since during that few mins pricec
updates.notes: Tweet explains non-acceptance protocol mechanics referencing existing morning plan level 7527; 7532/7537/7538 are illustrative examples in a reply, not actionable named levels.

updates.tweet_text: @Mdummy4 7527 never reclaimed at any point Friday and I never said that. My rules are very cut and dried, I repeat them everyday in newsletter, and at no point did 7527 reclaim per my own rulset

updates.tweet_text: @schwartzaman @Mdummy4 I make sure to repeat the criteria in every single newsletter so it is clear for people.
